alignments.json_text: Hello?

alignments.json_text: Hi, y'all, who's this?

alignments.proposed_text: Hi, uh... who's this?

alignments.json_text: Robert.
alignments.wiki_text: Robert.
alignments.proposed_text: Robert.

alignments.json_text: Hey, how's it going?
alignments.wiki_text: Hey, how's it goin'? Yeah, I was wondering if you could--
alignments.proposed_text: Hey, how's it going?

alignments.json_text: Yeah, I was wondering if you...
alignments.wiki_text: Hey, how's it goin'? Yeah, I was wondering if you could--
alignments.proposed_text: Yeah, I was wondering if you...

alignments.json_text: Hey, man.
alignments.wiki_text: Hey, man.
alignments.proposed_text: Hey, man.

alignments.json_text: What are you talking shit to my brother for, man?
alignments.wiki_text: What are you talking shit to my brother for, man?
alignments.proposed_text: What are you talking shit to my brother for, man?

alignments.json_text: What are you talking to you, dude?
alignments.wiki_text: What are you talkin', dude?
alignments.proposed_text: What are you talkin', dude?

alignments.json_text: What?
alignments.wiki_text: What?
alignments.proposed_text: What?

alignments.json_text: Do you want me to talk shit with my fist to your lips?
alignments.wiki_text: Do you want me to talk shit with my fist to your lips?
alignments.proposed_text: Do you want me to talk shit with my fist to your lips?

alignments.json_text: What?
alignments.wiki_text: What?
alignments.proposed_text: What?

alignments.json_text: Got to bust your lips, buddy?
alignments.wiki_text: Do I have to bust your lips, buddy?
alignments.proposed_text: Do I have to bust your lips, buddy?

alignments.json_text: Hey, man.
alignments.wiki_text: Hey, man. Why are you always talking shit, calling my fucking house, man? Don't talk shit to my brother.
alignments.proposed_text: Hey, man.

alignments.json_text: Why are you always talking shit?
alignments.wiki_text: Hey, man. Why are you always talking shit, calling my fucking house, man? Don't talk shit to my brother.
alignments.proposed_text: Why are you always talking shit?

alignments.json_text: Call my fucking out, man. Don't talk shit to my brother.
alignments.wiki_text: Hey, man. Why are you always talking shit, calling my fucking house, man? Don't talk shit to my brother.
alignments.proposed_text: Call my fucking out, man. Don't talk shit to my brother.

alignments.json_text: I'm talking shit to you, mister.
alignments.wiki_text: I'm talking shit to you, mister.
alignments.proposed_text: I'm talking shit to you, mister.

alignments.json_text: Yeah, you talk shit to me, because I don't fucking know who you're sorry ass is, and I can't fucking get you.
alignments.wiki_text: Yeah, you talk shit to me-- '[beep]' --'cause I don't fucking know who your sorry ass is, and I can't fucking get you.
alignments.proposed_text: Yeah, you talk shit to me-- '[beep]' --'cause I don't fucking know who your sorry ass is, and I can't fucking get you.

alignments.json_text: I just wanted to play with our band, liquefied mummy.
alignments.wiki_text: I just wanted you to play with our band, Liquified Mummy.
alignments.proposed_text: I just wanted you to play with our band, Liquified Mummy.

alignments.json_text: What are you trying to lie for him, man?
alignments.wiki_text: What you tryin' to lie for, man?
alignments.proposed_text: What you tryin' to lie for, man?

alignments.json_text: Liquid, liquefied mummy, dude. That's the name of our band, dude.
alignments.wiki_text: Liqui... Liquified Mummy, dude. That's the name of our band, dude.
alignments.proposed_text: Liqui... Liquified Mummy, dude. That's the name of our band, dude.

alignments.json_text: I've got no damn band.
alignments.wiki_text: You don't got no damn band.
alignments.proposed_text: You don't got no damn band.

alignments.json_text: What? Yeah, dude, liquefied mummy, brother.
alignments.wiki_text: What? Yeah I do. Liquified Mummy, brother.
alignments.proposed_text: What? Yeah I do. Liquified Mummy, brother.

alignments.json_text: Look, man, you're gonna talk shit, I'm gonna come on pull on my cleats to your face, and that's it.
alignments.wiki_text: Look man, you gonna talk shit? I'm gonna come over and put on my cleats to your face. How does that sound?
alignments.proposed_text: Look man, you gonna talk shit? I'm gonna come over and put on my cleats to your face. How does that sound?

alignments.json_text: Get off the pockets, guys.
alignments.wiki_text: '[sampled]' Lay off the bong hits, guys.
alignments.proposed_text: '[sampled]' Lay off the bong hits, guys.
